title: Cobblemon Failsafe's Pheromosa
description: Adds Pheromosa Model and Animations to Cobblemon
body:
This addon gives the Ultra Beast Pheromosa a Model in Cobblemon

Includes Following Animations: Ground Idle, Ground Walk, Blink, Sleep, Cry, Battle Intro, Physical & Special Attack Animations.

This does not spawn pheromosa.

This is the same model used for Raiden Shogun Pheromosa From Failskins 

If any addon/mod/server/modpack/etc creator wants to put this into their pack or whatever, I’ll allow it, no need to ask.

Credit is optional, I won’t force you to.

You are allowed to change the license of the model to whatever u want. I don’t care if you make a custom skin and try to sell it, you can do whatever you want. 

If you like what you seeing and want to donate, you can donate at https://ko-fi.com/failsafe
